name: Immuneering Corp
business: Immuneering Corp is a late-stage clinical oncology company developing Deep Cyclic Inhibitors, a new category of anti-cancer medicines. Its lead product candidate, atebimetinib, is an oral, once-daily inhibitor of MEK designed for improved durability and tolerability across MAPK pathway-driven tumors such as pancreatic cancer.

exposures.sentence: We are a late-stage clinical oncology company focused on keeping cancer patients alive and helping them thrive.

catalysts.event: Present further updated circulating tumor DNA data at a major scientific meeting
catalysts.sentence: presenting further updated circulating tumor DNA data on acquired alterations from cancer patients treated with atebimetinib at a major scientific meeting, in the second quarter of 2026

catalysts.event: Announce further updated survival data from over 50 first-line pancreatic cancer patients in Phase 1/2a trial
catalysts.sentence: announcing further updated survival data from over 50 first-line pancreatic cancer patients treated with atebimetinib in combination with mGnP in our ongoing Phase 1/2a clinical trial, in the first half of 2026

catalysts.event: Dose first patient in planned clinical trial of atebimetinib in combination with Libtayo in non-small cell lung cancer
catalysts.sentence: dosing the first patient in a planned clinical trial of atebimetinib in combination with Libtayo in non-small cell lung cancer patients, in the second half of 2026

catalysts.event: Dose first patient in MAPKeeper 301 Phase 3 registrational trial for first-line pancreatic cancer
catalysts.sentence: We expect to dose the first patient in the MAPKeeper 301 trial in mid-2026.
